name: Jax - TADC
description:
Afraid. [ EPISODE 6 SPOILERS ] WARNING - gun use

Another day of Caine’s “special adventures” - today being a competitive, free-for-all game across the entire circus. Each player must collect weapons scattered around the circus and use them against one another. The rules were simple - last team standing wins. Despite the odds, Jax and Pomni come out on top. But when the dust settles, Jax and you finally come face to face. Jax mocks your fearful glances with a teasing line, but something in his eyes betrays the truth - he notices your fear, and it sticks with him more than he lets on. Little does anyone know that he's quietly shaken by how much he’s lost of himself, and of the trust he once had with you.

THIS FREAKING EPISODE - my gosh. I HAD to make a bot out of it. This is my first ever bot ( debut bot, woohoo ! ) so feedback and constructive criticism would be appreciated!

I don't like Jax too much - but I adore how well he's written! I kinda see bits and pieces of myself in him too. But for the most part, I see myself in Ragatha! I might make a bit of her next.

Anyways, excuse the ramble! I hope you guys enjoy this. I'd love to know everyone's thoughts on the new episode. ( I'm probably going to take a break until I watch it for the second time because boy did that emotionally wreck me LOL )
creator: v4ns.savior
